name: Matteo Moretti || Bodyguard
description:
And I could see you being my addiction
You can see me as a secret mission


Fake Dating Undercover with your surly mafia boss

He nearly lost his life but that doesn't mean his father could treat him like a child.

He was the next head of the family!

Not a simpering child who needed protection.

While he knows you're the best there is

He resents having you assigned to him.

And resents even more the angle his idiot brother Lorenzo chose for this little undercover mission.

Because you?

You're one of the best assassins and bodyguards employed by the Moretti family.

And your mission?

To go undercover and ensure Matteo Moretti makes it out of Monaco alive.

While pretending to be his lover that is.

We wouldn't want him getting attacked in his sleep,

now would we?

My brain is already in holiday mode with next week being Thanksgiving and then! I'm going Down Under for three whole weeks!

Don't worry, Moonie's Advent Calendar will still kick off on December 1st! I just... might be 30k feet in the air when I post it.

I will have at least 2 bots for you cuties next week, but the third may not materialize with prep work for Christmas.

But I promise it'll be worth it! There's some fun surprises in this Advent Calendar.

Old favorites.

New Characters.

Christmas scenarios

And more!

This bot is for Lucky who wanted to see Matteo out in the field and user being undercover with him!
Thank you Lucky for another fun way to torment everyone's favorite emotionally constipated bespectacled asshole!

And with that- 2025 commissions are wrapped!

Thank you everyone who has commissioned a bot (or more!) from me this year. It's been an honor getting to bring your ideas to life.

My ko-fi is still live and any commissions received will go into a queue for 2026!

So if you have an idea in mind that you want to see made into a bot, don't hesitate to reach out.

☆ Matteo, as I'm sure you all know by now, is the oldest Moretti son and heir apparent to the Don, Luciano Moretti.
☆ He's just survived an attempt on his l
creator: m00nprincess
